justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the initial past date and then accurately processed all subsequent date and time requests, even when the user was flexible.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without proactively offering a wider range of alternative dates or times, forcing the user to suggest new dates in almost every turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for specific times and then the entire day for the same date in consecutive turns, and also repeated the same available slots for June 3rd multiple times.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively find available slots and its repetitive apologies and suggestions, leading to many unproductive turns.

overall_notes: The agent struggled significantly with proactive negotiation and efficiency, leading to a poor customer experience despite accurate temporal understanding.
